title: Reduce WIDTH warnings on int < compares
body:
Make these compatible with most of the tools - design_compiler/vcs/xilium:

For ex, in comparisons of sized parameter and integer:


```
module kuku;
parameter [1:0] PARM = 3;

initial begin
    for( int i=0; i< PARM; i++) $display (i);
end

endmodule

```
verilator --lint-only try.sv

gives:
```
%Warning-WIDTH: try.sv:5: Operator LT expects 32 bits on the RHS, but RHS's VARREF 'PARM' generates 2 bits.
                        : ... In instance kuku
    for( int i=0; i< PARM; i++) $display (i);
                   ^
                ... Use "/* verilator lint_off WIDTH */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Error: Exiting due to 1 warning(s)
%Error: Command Failed /wdc/apps/veripool/verilator/4.020/bin/verilator_bin --lint-only try.sv

```
It should give error/warning only if a constant doesn't fit variable ...
